message.thinking: We need to answer each of the 3 questions. Provide JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question" (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), "feedback" (text), "complies" (boolean). Evaluate the given text: It's a table of activities and dates. It does not list main sections of thesis. So question 1: does the text list main sections? No. So compliance false. Feedback: mention that table lists activities, not sections. Question 2: description of contents of each section? No. So false. Feedback: no description. Question 3: general structure? No. So false. Feedback: cannot infer structure. Provide JSON array accordingly.
